title: Placental Abruption

vignette.text: A 32-year-old G2P1 at 34 weeks presents with sudden severe abdominal pain and vaginal bleeding after a motor vehicle accident. She has chronic hypertension.

questions.question: Key feature distinguishing abruption from previa?
questions.explanation: Abruption = PAINFUL bleeding with rigid uterus. Previa = PAINLESS bleeding with soft uterus.

keyTakeaways: Risk: HTN, trauma, cocaine, prior abruption
Can cause DIC from tissue factor release
Delivery if unstable or fetal distress
